# J.P. Franca — AI Product Builder & Communications Strategist

> I build products with AI and know how to sell them. Shipped 2 platforms to iOS/Android (Dine With Me, Media Training AI) without a programming degree. 8+ years in corporate communications (Samsung, Bayer, BH Airport). Based in Cork, Ireland. Available as employee or VAT-registered contractor. Remote-friendly across EU.

## Profile Summary

Name: Joao Paulo (J.P.) O'Connor Franca
Location: Cork, Ireland
Citizenship: EEA (Portuguese)
Languages: English (fluent), Portuguese (native), Spanish (basic)
Email: oconnorfranca@gmail.com

Availability: Immediate — Employee, B2B (VAT registered), or Remote

## Employment History

### Everise, Ireland (Jul 2025 – Present)
Customer Service Representative (Remote)
- Support Humana/CenterWell Pharmacy clients in the US
- ~40 calls/day, quality scores: 87-93% across all metrics
- 121 customer surveys, HIPAA-compliant communication

### A Brief Experience in Cork, Ireland (2024)
Producer & Communications Lead
- Independent short film production
- Cast 30+ actors, secured 6 sponsors, premiere for 60 attendees
- 1,230 website visitors, 296 video views
- First collaboration with Irish press

### BH Airport, Brazil (Jul 2018 – Aug 2021)
Communications Consultant
- 100+ editions of corporate publications
- 50+ corporate videos produced
- Created 'Momento Conexao' weekly employee alignment programme
- Annual report production (11.17M passengers, EBITDA +102%)
- Co-authored industry paper on airport brand building
- Press advisory and media relations
- Airport serves 30,000 passengers/day

### MSL Group / Publicis, Brazil (Nov 2014 – Oct 2016)
Marketing & Communications Assistant
- Key accounts: Samsung, ABCR, Inframerica Airports
- Press kits, media monitoring, executive insights
- LATAM media coordination
- Social media reports and digital strategy

### Viva o Centro Association, Brazil (Apr 2012 – Jan 2014)
Marketing & Communications Executive
- Promoted from intern to lead communications
- 12+ public events organised with urban planning officials
- 56 Local Action Groups coordinated
- Launched NGO website and social media presence

### CETESB — Environmental Agency, Brazil (Apr 2011 – Apr 2012)
Communications Intern
- Press relations for state environmental department
- Covered Zoological Park, Forestry Foundation, scientific institutes
- Translated environmental science into accessible media content
- Crisis communications support

## Freelance & Personal Projects

### Dine With Me (2025) — https://dinewithme.org
Social dining platform with cooking competitions. Built from scratch.
Tech: HTML/CSS/JS, Supabase, Capacitor, Stripe. iOS & Android.

### Media Training AI (2024) — https://mediatraining.ai
AI-powered public speaking and media training platform.
Ran Google Ads campaigns targeting public speaking keywords.

### DWM Press / Signed with Faith (2025)
B2B sales: 382 leads, 5,060 emails, 213 calls, 37 visits, 2 sales closed.

Diversity & Inclusion communications programme. Women on board: 14.3% to 20%.

### CNH Industrial (2021) — Aberje Award
LinkedIn employer branding. Ranked 9th LinkedIn Top Companies Brazil. 100% organic.

### Alegria Virtual (2017) — https://alegriavirtual.com.br
VR social impact initiative for hospitalised children. Still active.
Press coverage: Globo, Record, SBT.
